subcodes.first_line: O my God! Bestow upon me complete detachment unto Thee, and shine forth upon me at the threshold of Thine inviolable sovereignty, till the veils be rent asunder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی هب لی کمال الانقطاع الیک و تجل علی بباب الامتناع لدیک حتی خرق الاحجاب
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
